title: 50 years of Annakili: The film that launched Ilaiyaraaja’s career
description: Fifty years have passed like a fleeting moment, but the songs of Annakili continue to haunt generations of music lovers. With the film’s release began the extraordinary musical journey of Ilaiyaraaja, whose career would later rise to unparalleled heights. Gangai Amaran, who worked closely with his brother during the composing sessions and served as the rhythm guitarist for the film, recalls those memorable days with B. Kolappan. “The higher octaves in the humming of the song ‘Annakili Unnai Thed
